why: Site-specific Western Psychiatric visiting-student page does NOT exist. The system-level UPSOM/UPMC programs apply. Domestic = LCME/AOA only (excludes Caribbean). Source is silent on whether Caribbean schools count as 'international' for this program. Site-specific Western Psychiatric placement is not guaranteed.
must_not_claim: site-specific Western Psychiatric guarantee; broad IMG access; J-1 sponsorship; H-1B sponsorship
notes: Could be promoted as SYSTEM_PAGE_NO_SITE_SPECIFIC_GUARANTEE row similar to CC Hillcrest, BUT only if Caribbean eligibility for the international program is resolved with curator. International program excludes graduates entirely (must be enrolled in final year).

why: NYC H+H MOSAIC VSP is the public visiting-student program. Eligibility is US LCME (allopathic) or AOA (osteopathic) only — Caribbean/IMG explicitly excluded. $2,000 stipend + $2,000 housing. Application by email PDF; URM encouraged. System-level program; participants matched to a participating H+H site, not Lincoln-specifically.
must_not_claim: Caribbean accessible; IMG accessible; site-specific Lincoln guarantee; J-1/H-1B sponsorship
notes: Most plausible disposition is READY_PUBLIC_US_ONLY (similar to CCF Mercy/Hillcrest) with SYSTEM_PAGE_NO_LINCOLN_SPECIFIC_GUARANTEE caveat. Not IMG-relevant per source.
